channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Tree ingress over our property, and roots blocking wooden Brook, 13th April
item.description:
We have a weeping willow tree which is starting to ingress over our properties drive ,but more importantly the root system is starting to block the Wotton Brook.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Valiant Way, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 13th April
item.description:
There is a pothole outside the property which is causing lot of issues and bus go over it and it makes a terrible sound. - Large pothole about 18 inches by 24 inches
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 13th April
item.description:
Loose kerb stones Please lift and relay x 2 kerbstones 900x150mm x2 Standard TM No parking cones required before starting work Stats (FW Kerbing Defects)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 13th April
item.description:
Loose kerb stones Please lift and relay x 2 kerbstones and 1 kerb end 900x150mm x2 plus x 1 300mm end Standard TM No parking cones required before starting work Stats (FW Kerbing Defects)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 13th April
item.description:
The tree outside numbers 72 and 70 Albemarle gate is continuously shedding large pieces of branch onto the pavements, road and cars , maybe dying/ rotten ? I think it is a silver birch and bends considerably in high winds….possibly a safety issue
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 13th April
item.description:
Fallen tree on roadside is blocking my driveway - Fallen tree has smashed onto car on road and is now blocking my driveway access. I need it removing immediately to access the car and ev charger
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 13th April
item.description:
Edge deterioration CW 1000x500x60mm approx 2 way lights. Not marked or measured (CW6 Edge Deterioration)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 13th April
item.description:
Edge deterioration CW 600x300x60mm approx 2 way lights. Not marked or measured (CW6 Edge Deterioration)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 13th April
item.description:
Edge deterioration CW 1500x300x50mm approx 2 way lights. Not marked or measured (CW6 Edge Deterioration)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree fallen on car., 13th April
item.description:
Outside 36 Brooklyn Gardens since 04/04/2026

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32, Brooklyn Gardens, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Ash Tree located on Highway land

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 13th April
item.description:
ENWD OVERGROWN BUSH OBSTRUCTING VISIBILITY AT JUNCTION PLEASE CUT BACK TO ENSURE VISIBILITY 4 WAY STOP AND GO ADVANCED WARNING BOARDS (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 13th April
item.description:
Please pass to AHR for this area. Missing sign and damaged signpost, please replace sign and post.
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)

item.title: Quite a number of flags flying non British, 13th April
item.description:
American flag And another flag that is unrecognisable it has been up for a few months!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 71, Station Road, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No. 10 is back on the board!, 13th April
item.description:
Great job! The number 10 is back where it belongs, thank you very much.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Montpellier Walk, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 13th April
item.description:
Abrupt Level Difference FW 250mm x 200mm x 25mm Give and take TM With Temporary FW Closure Stats required Fill around ironwork (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lights not been working for weeks, 12th April
item.description:
All street lights in cul de sac permanently out
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 81, Beeches Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole on Climperwell road, 12th April
item.description:
Just before you come into brimpsfield after the entrance to brimpsfield park on the left side of climperwell road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Severe damage to pavement on Norwich Drive nr junction with Oxford Way, 12th April
item.description:
Severe damage to pavement on Norwich Drive nr junction with Oxford Way Note: this pavement has been repaired twice in previous year. I suggest that an inspection of the foundations might be in order to establish why this pavement is so unstable.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 42, Norwich Drive, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Outside number 23, 12th April
item.description:
Massive deep potholes reported ages ago

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Pilley Lane, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged verge and blocked drainage ditch, 12th April
item.description:
Opposite The Rushleys, Rushley Lane, Winchcombe, Cheltenham, GL54 5JE

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rushley Lane, Winchcombe, Tewkesbury
